DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT * PARTIES TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS (TRANSACTION ID # 78266707) AS TO DEFENDANT KNIGHT SPECIALTY INSURANCE COMPANY
MINUTES FOR JAN-23-2026 9:00 AM

LAW AND MOTION 301, JAN-23-2026 RE: DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE SUBJECT MATTER IS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MILL VALLEY INSURANCE SERVICES, INC. AND RONALD GUREWITZ'S DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD/CONCEALMENT) AND THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION (NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION). IT IS OTHERWISE OVERRULED. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFFS' REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE OF MILL VALLEY AND GUREWITZ'S CROSS-COMPLAINT. SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT AGREES TO DELIVER TO DEPT. 301 A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE PRECEDING SHOULD COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)
ORDER SUSTAINING DEFENDANTS MILL VALLEY INSURANCE SERVICES INC. AND RONALD GUREWITZ'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' EMPORIUM SF, LLC, DOUGLAS MARKS, AND DANIEL MARK' COMPLAINT
